name: Love Battle
description: A cross-platform gaming and competition app for iOS and Android. Features multiple payment methods (Stripe, Google Pay, Apple Pay) and significant user engagement through a popular YouTube channel integration.
tech_stack: Payment Integrations (Stripe, Google Pay, Apple Pay)
features: Real-time voting and scoring with minimal latency.
Leaderboards and user rankings based on live competition scores.
Secure digital wallets with Stripe, Google Pay, and Apple Pay checkouts.
Live YouTube streaming feed integration for instant challenge access.
my_role: Core Mobile Developer - Implemented a high-performance voting architecture that instantly reflects user votes across active competitions while preventing inconsistencies and ensuring fair vote synchronization between thousands of participants.
